---
title: "Prawn restoration and infection outcomes"
---

# Prawn restoration and infection outcomes

Evaluating whether ecological restoration can support human health by changing freshwater host communities and infection outcomes.

## Project angle

This work examines whether restoration of native predators can affect disease ecology and human infection outcomes in freshwater systems.

## Methods and outputs

- Intervention evaluation
- Before/after infection models
- Field and health outcome data integration
- Ecological restoration and One Health framing
